sqlMap.select: select * from metatrigger where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into metatrigger(metaobjectno, structureno, triggerevent, triggername, triggertype, triggerquery) values (#metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #triggerevent#, #triggername#, #triggertype#, #triggerquery# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('metatrigger') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select triggerevent, triggerno, triggername, triggertype, triggerquery, metaobjectno, structureno from metatrigger where triggerno = #triggerno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update metatrigger set
triggerevent = #triggerevent# triggerevent = null triggername = #triggername# triggername = null triggertype = #triggertype# triggertype = null triggerquery = #triggerquery# triggerquery = null
where triggerno = #triggerno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from metatrigger where triggerno = #triggerno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from metatrigger where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select triggerevent, triggerno, triggername, triggertype, triggerquery, metaobjectno, structureno from metatrigger where triggerno = #triggerno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select triggerno, metaobjectno, structureno, triggerevent, triggername, triggertype, triggerquery from metatrigger where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
